introSection: Electric Eel is a steel launched roller coaster located at SeaWorld San Diego in San Diego, California, USA. It opened on May 10, 2018.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The addition of Electric Eel was announced in January 2017.

Electric Eel had been expected to open on May 12, 2018. However, in April, the park announced that the opening would be brought forward two days to May 10.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Electric Eel is a Sky Rocket II installation from Premier Rides, similar to Tempesto at Busch Gardens Williamsburg, also owned by SeaWorld.

fullText:
Electric Eel is a steel launched roller coaster located at SeaWorld San Diego in San Diego, California, USA. It opened on May 10, 2018.

The addition of Electric Eel was announced in January 2017.

Electric Eel had been expected to open on May 12, 2018. However, in April, the park announced that the opening would be brought forward two days to May 10.

Electric Eel is a Sky Rocket II installation from Premier Rides, similar to Tempesto at Busch Gardens Williamsburg, also owned by SeaWorld.
